data.title: Hotel California
data.song_notes:
Part of the GHtoRB3 Project.
 
V2:
Added a count-in.
Polished instrument charts and reductions, and drum animations.
Made changes to OD and unison bonuses across all charts.
Reorganized vocal phrases.
Added a numerical ID and changed the internal file name.
 
Big thanks to Ruggy for fixing up the pro bass chart.  Note, this version does not have a pro guitar chart.  That one still needs work.  For now, if you want to play the old pro guitar chart, there is an upgrade package (the "Alternate Version" download) which you can bundle using the Upgrade Bundler in C3 CON Tools.

file.file_notes:
Part of the GHtoRB3 Project.
 
V2:
Added a count-in.
Polished instrument charts and reductions, and drum animations.
Made changes to OD and unison bonuses across all charts.

Added a numerical ID and changed the internal file name.
 
Big thanks to Ruggy for fixing up the pro bass chart.  Note, this version does not have a pro guitar chart.  That one still needs work.  For now, if you want to play the old pro guitar chart, there is an upgrade package in the section for other downloads, which you can bundle using the Upgrade Bundler in C3 CON Tools.

data.title: Welcome to the Jungle
data.song_notes:
Part of the GHtoRB3 Project.
 
V2:
Polished instrument charts and reductions, and drum animations.
Made changes to OD and unison bonuses across all charts.
Corrected some vocal pitches and lyric spellings.
Fixed audio mixing issue: guitar and bass have dedicated stems, everything else is in the background stem.
Added a numerical ID and changed the internal file name.

data.title: Stairway to Heaven
data.song_notes:
Why was this updated you say?

Well Trojan Nemo did an amazing job with it, but with todays tools, we wanted to give it an overhaul, as well as add Pro Guitar and Bass, and of course a custom venue.  This is a complete re-chart, not a touch up of Trojans.  Feel free to decide which version you want in your library by downloading Trojans to the right.

Pro upgrades and venue compliments of CapnKris.

The rest was a SomeOldGuys team effort.

file.file_notes:
This custom was auto-converted from the C3 database. Please let the author know if something is wrong. If you ARE the author, and this song is not correctly assigned to you, please contact pksage.
 
Pro Guitar/Bass by columbo777.
 
This classic metal song from Black Sabbath's well-known album "Paranoid" was long overdue for an appearance in Rock Band. Guitar of course features that classic riff that you've been dying to play, as well as some neat solos. Bass plays the same riff but throws in some neat licks in parts of the song. Drums have a heavy rhythm with plenty of fun fills. Vocalists will finally learn the lyrics other than "I am Iron Man".

data.title: Can't Stop
data.song_notes:
Author=thewinnerisgreg (original author) and Jusey1 (fixes)
reductions=c16
 
Please direct message me if I have missed giving the proper credits to contributors or if you have interest in making any improvements.
 
Oct 9 2017 Update:
New song_id
No chart updates - Audio replaced and synced (no change to tempo map).
Thanks Atruejedi for improved audio quality.

 

 
My apologies it took so long to improve audio quality. Feel free to send me direct messages (reminders help). I am not the best at checking the songs for comments. I do not get alerts by following a song.

data.title: Jump
data.song_notes: Part of the GHtoRB3 project. V2 includes new multitrack stems with a count-in and reworked guitar and keys stems; some vocal part reassignments and a new third harmony part; changes to the keys, bass and drum charts and animations; and an awesome new venue by KrisAngel!
